---
title: "Group Project"
sidebar: false
---

## VAST Challenge 2026 MC1

This section contains our group project analyzing the VAST Challenge 2026 Mini-Challenge 1.

### Project Components

- [Project Proposal](proposal.qmd)
- [Shiny Dashboard](https://ttbui2025.shinyapps.io/Group_Project/){target="_blank"}

### Overview

Our project investigates the information leak at TenantThread on June 5, 2046, analyzing whether it was a deliberate leak or system breakdown under pressure.
